overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from a video game (Watch Dogs: Legion) showing a character in a leather jacket walking through a rainy urban London street. The character walks along the sidewalk, crosses an intersection, and continues down the street past pedestrians, a black taxi, and a flying drone, with industrial brick buildings and modern towers visible in the background.

events.description: black taxi drives past from right to left on the street

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the wet sidewalk observing the street and buildings ahead

notable_agents.action: black taxi driving along the street from right to left

entered.detail: large industrial red brick building with tall arched windows across the street
tall contemporary skyscrapers visible in the background
multi-story building covered in vibrant graffiti and street art
rain-slicked paved pedestrian walkway with yellow line markings

segments.scene_description: The character walks along a wet urban sidewalk next to a multi-lane street. Across the road stands a large red brick warehouse building, while a colorful graffiti-covered building becomes visible on the right. Modern glass towers rise in the background. A black taxi drives past on the street as the character continues walking forward.

events.description: pedestrian with checkered umbrella walks past the character
small quadcopter drone flies overhead in the sky

agents.ego_description: stepping off the curb and walking across the intersection toward the opposite sidewalk

notable_agents.action: man holding a checkered umbrella walking past the character

entered.detail: white striped pedestrian crossing lines on the asphalt
deciduous trees with autumn foliage lining the street
small black quadcopter drone hovering in the sky

segments.scene_description: The character enters a wide urban intersection, crossing the street on a marked crosswalk. A pedestrian with a checkered umbrella passes by in the opposite direction. The colorful mural building shifts to the left as the character crosses. A small drone becomes visible flying overhead against the cloudy sky.

events.description: character continues walking past a pedestrian in a flat cap
white sedan drives past on the street

agents.ego_description: walking along the sidewalk on the opposite side of the street, passing various pedestrians

notable_agents.action: man wearing a flat cap and dark suit walking toward the camera

entered.detail: brick building with red MOWLE'S signage on the facade
red double decker bus visible in the distance down the street

segments.scene_description: Having crossed the street, the character continues walking along the opposite sidewalk. The character passes a man in a flat cap and observes a red double decker bus in the distance. A white sedan drives past on the street while the flying drone remains visible overhead. The street trees now line the left side of the path.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a rainy London street as the character transitions from a sidewalk walk to a street crossing and back onto a pedestrian path. It begins with the character walking along a wet sidewalk past a large red brick warehouse and a graffiti-covered building, while a black taxi drives by against a backdrop of modern glass towers. As the character enters a wide intersection, the camera follows them across a marked crosswalk, passing a pedestrian with a checkered umbrella while a small drone appears in the cloudy sky. The scene then shifts as the character reaches the opposite sidewalk, moving past a man in a flat cap and observing a red double-decker bus in the distance. Finally, the camera continues forward as a white sedan drives past and street trees begin to line the left side of the path under the hovering drone.
